title: polygala humifusa
intro: Polygala humifusa, also known as American foxglove-beans, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant actions, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Polygala humifusa include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
